words.exampleArabic: تُعَدُّ كُرَةُ الْقَدَمِ أَكْثَرَ الرِّيَاضَاتِ شَعْبِيَّةً فِي الْعَالَمِ.
words.exampleBs: Fudbal je najpopularniji sport na svijetu.
words.exampleEn: Football is the most popular sport in the world.

words.exampleArabic: يَلْعَبُ الطُّلَّابُ كُرَةَ السَّلَّةِ فِي الْمَلْعَبِ كُلَّ مَسَاءٍ.
words.exampleBs: Studenti igraju košarku na terenu svako veče.
words.exampleEn: The students play basketball on the court every evening.

words.exampleArabic: تُعَدُّ السِّبَاحَةُ مِنْ أَفْضَلِ الرِّيَاضَاتِ لِتَقْوِيَةِ الْجِسْمِ.
words.exampleBs: Plivanje je jedan od najboljih sportova za jačanje tijela.
words.exampleEn: Swimming is one of the best sports for strengthening the body.

words.exampleArabic: يُمَارِسُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ الْجَرْيَ فِي الصَّبَاحِ لِلتَّمَتُّعِ بِصِحَّةٍ جَيِّدَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Mnogi ljudi trče ujutro da bi bili zdravi.
words.exampleEn: Many people practise running in the morning to enjoy good health.

words.exampleArabic: فَازَ اللَّاعِبُ بِبُطُولَةِ التِّنِسِ بَعْدَ مُبَارَاةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Igrač je pobijedio na teniskom turniru nakon duge utakmice.
words.exampleEn: The player won the tennis championship after a long match.

words.exampleArabic: فَازَ فَرِيقُنَا بِمُبَارَاةِ الْكُرَةِ الطَّائِرَةِ بِنَتِيجَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Naš tim je pobijedio u odbojkaškoj utakmici s uvjerljivim rezultatom.
words.exampleEn: Our team won the volleyball match by a large margin.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَمْتِعُ الشَّبَابُ بِرُكُوبِ الدَّرَّاجَةِ فِي الطَّبِيعَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Mladi uživaju u vožnji biciklom u prirodi.
words.exampleEn: Young people enjoy cycling in nature.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ تَدْرِيبُ الْمِلَاكَمَةِ قُوَّةً بَدَنِيَّةً وَتَرْكِيزًا عَالِيًا.
words.exampleBs: Trening boksa zahtijeva fizičku snagu i visoku koncentraciju.
words.exampleEn: Boxing training requires physical strength and high concentration.

words.exampleArabic: تَمْتَلِكُ الْمُصَارَعَةُ تَارِيخًا قَدِيمًا يَعُودُ إِلَى آلَافِ السِّنِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Rvanje ima dugu povijest koja seže hiljadama godina unazad.
words.exampleEn: Wrestling has an ancient history dating back thousands of years.

words.exampleArabic: شَارَكَ الرِّيَاضِيُّ فِي عِدَّةِ فِعَالِيَّاتٍ مِنْ أَلْعَابِ الْقُوَى.
words.exampleBs: Sportaš je sudjelovao u nekoliko atletskih disciplina.
words.exampleEn: The athlete participated in several athletics events.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَطَلَّبُ تَمَارِينُ الْجُمْبَازِ مَرُونَةً وَتَوَازُنًا فَائِقَيْنِ.
words.exampleBs: Gimnastičke vježbe zahtijevaju iznimnu fleksibilnost i ravnotežu.
words.exampleEn: Gymnastics exercises require exceptional flexibility and balance.

words.exampleArabic: تَعَاوَنَ الْفَرِيقُ بِرُوحٍ عَالِيَةٍ لِتَحْقِيقِ الْفَوْزِ.
words.exampleBs: Tim je surađivao s visokim duhom kako bi postigao pobjedu.
words.exampleEn: The team cooperated with high spirit to achieve victory.

words.exampleArabic: أَثْبَتَ اللَّاعِبُ مَهَارَتَهُ الْعَالِيَةَ خِلَالَ الْمُبَارَاةِ.
words.exampleBs: Igrač je dokazao svoju visoku vještinu tokom utakmice.
words.exampleEn: The player proved his high skill during the match.

words.exampleArabic: وَضَعَ الْمُدَرِّبُ خُطَّةً تَكْتِيكِيَّةً مُحْكَمَةً لِلْمُبَارَاةِ.
words.exampleBs: Trener je izradio čvrst taktički plan za utakmicu.
words.exampleEn: The coach drew up a solid tactical plan for the match.

words.exampleArabic: أَصْدَرَ الْحَكَمُ بِطَاقَةً حَمْرَاءَ بَعْدَ الْمُخَالَفَةِ الشَّدِيدَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Sudija je izdao crveni karton nakon grubog prekršaja.
words.exampleEn: The referee issued a red card after the serious foul.

words.exampleArabic: امْتَلَأَ الْمَلْعَبُ بِالْجُمْهُورِ الْمُتَحَمِّسِ.
words.exampleBs: Stadion je bio pun oduševljenih navijača.
words.exampleEn: The stadium was filled with enthusiastic supporters.

words.exampleArabic: اِنْتَهَتِ الْمُبَارَاةُ بِتَعَادُلٍ مُثِيرٍ فِي الدَّقِيقَةِ الْأَخِيرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Utakmica je završila neriješenim rezultatom u zadnjoj minuti.
words.exampleEn: The match ended in an exciting draw in the final minute.

words.exampleArabic: اشْتَرَكَ عَدَدٌ كَبِيرٌ مِنَ الرِّيَاضِيِّينَ فِي الْمُسَابَقَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Veliki broj sportaša učestvovao je u natjecanju.
words.exampleEn: A large number of athletes participated in the competition.

words.exampleArabic: رَفَعَ قَائِدُ الْفَرِيقِ الْكَأْسَ أَمَامَ الْجُمْهُورِ الْفَرِحِ.
words.exampleBs: Kapiten tima je podigao trofej pred radosnim navijačima.
words.exampleEn: The team captain raised the trophy before the joyful crowd.

words.exampleArabic: سَجَّلَ اللَّاعِبُ هَدَفًا رَائِعًا فِي الدَّقِيقَةِ التِّسْعِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Igrač je postigao divan gol u devedesetoj minuti.
words.exampleEn: The player scored a magnificent goal in the ninetieth minute.

words.exampleArabic: انْتَهَتِ الْمُبَارَاةُ بِنَتِيجَةٍ ثَلَاثَةٍ لِصِفْرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Utakmica je završila rezultatom tri prema nula.
words.exampleEn: The match ended with a score of three to zero.

words.exampleArabic: كُرِّمَ الْفَائِزُ بِمِيدَالِيَّةٍ ذَهَبِيَّةٍ فِي حَفْلِ الْإِغْلَاقِ.
words.exampleBs: Pobjednik je nagrađen zlatnom medaljom na ceremoniji zatvaranja.
words.exampleEn: The winner was honoured with a gold medal at the closing ceremony.

words.exampleArabic: دَافَعَ الْبَطَلُ عَنْ لَقَبِهِ بِجَدَارَةٍ فَائِقَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Prvak je dostojanstveno branio svoju titulu.
words.exampleEn: The champion defended his title with outstanding merit.

words.exampleArabic: تَقْوَى الْعَضَلَةُ بِالتَّدْرِيبِ الْمُنْتَظَمِ وَالتَّغْذِيَةِ الصَّحِيحَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Mišić se jača redovitim treningom i pravilnom prehranom.
words.exampleEn: The muscle strengthens with regular training and proper nutrition.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَاجُ الرِّيَاضِيُّ إِلَى الْقُوَّةِ وَالتَّحَمُّلِ مَعًا.
words.exampleBs: Sportaš treba i snagu i izdržljivost.
words.exampleEn: The athlete needs both strength and endurance.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَمِيَّزُ الْعَدَّاءُ بِسُرْعَتِهِ الاِسْتِثْنَائِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Sprinter se odlikuje izuzetnom brzinom.
words.exampleEn: The sprinter stands out for his exceptional speed.

words.exampleArabic: يَخْضَعُ الرِّيَاضِيُّونَ لِتَدْرِيبٍ شَاقٍّ قَبْلَ الْبُطُولَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportaši prolaze kroz naporan trening prije turnira.
words.exampleEn: Athletes undergo intensive training before championships.

words.exampleArabic: يَبْدَأُ الرِّيَاضِيُّ جَلْسَةَ التَّدْرِيبِ دَائِمًا بِالْإِحْمَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportaš uvijek počinje trening zagrijavanjem.
words.exampleEn: The athlete always starts the training session with a warm-up.

words.exampleArabic: يُوصِي الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِمُمَارَسَةِ التَّمَارِينِ الرِّيَاضِيَّةِ بِانْتِظَامٍ.
words.exampleBs: Ljekari preporučuju redovito bavljenje tjelesnim vježbama.
words.exampleEn: Doctors recommend practising physical exercises regularly.

words.exampleArabic: يَلْعَبُ الْأَطْفَالُ كُرَةَ الْقَدَمِ فِي الشَّارِعِ.
words.exampleBs: Djeca igraju fudbal na ulici.
words.exampleEn: The children play football in the street.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْعَى كُلُّ فَرِيقٍ إِلَى أَنْ يَفُوزَ بِالْبُطُولَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Svaki tim teži da pobijedi na turniru.
words.exampleEn: Every team strives to win the championship.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الرِّيَاضِيُّ مِنَ الْهَزِيمَةِ حِينَ يَخْسَرُ.
words.exampleBs: Sportaš uči iz poraza kada izgubi.
words.exampleEn: The athlete learns from defeat when he loses.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَدَرَّبُ الْفَرِيقُ يَوْمِيًّا اسْتِعْدَادًا لِلْمَوْسِمِ الْجَدِيدِ.
words.exampleBs: Tim trenira svakodnevno u pripremi za novu sezonu.
words.exampleEn: The team trains daily in preparation for the new season.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَنَافَسُ الرِّيَاضِيُّونَ مِنْ دُوَلٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ فِي الْأَلْعَابِ الْأُولِمْبِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportaši iz različitih zemalja natječu se na Olimpijskim igrama.
words.exampleEn: Athletes from different countries compete in the Olympic Games.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَجِّلُ الْمُهَاجِمُ الْمَاهِرُ الْأَهْدَافَ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Vješti napadač lako postiže golove.
words.exampleEn: The skilled striker scores goals with ease.

words.exampleArabic: يَرْكُلُ اللَّاعِبُ الْكُرَةَ بِقُوَّةٍ نَحْوَ الْمَرْمَى.
words.exampleBs: Igrač snažno šutira loptu prema golu.
words.exampleEn: The player kicks the ball powerfully towards the goal.

words.exampleArabic: يَرْمِي اللَّاعِبُ الْكُرَةَ إِلَى زَمِيلِهِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Igrač precizno baca loptu svom suigraču.
words.exampleEn: The player throws the ball to his teammate with precision.

words.exampleArabic: يَجْرِي الرِّيَاضِيُّ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِمُدَّةِ سَاعَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Sportaš trči svaki dan sat vremena.
words.exampleEn: The athlete runs for one hour every day.

words.exampleArabic: تُحِبُّ الطِّفْلَةُ أَنْ تَسْبَحَ فِي الْمَسْبَحِ.
words.exampleBs: Djevojčica voli plivati u bazenu.
words.exampleEn: The girl loves to swim in the pool.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَدُّ هَذَا الْعَدَّاءُ مِنْ أَسْرَعِ الرِّيَاضِيِّينَ فِي التَّارِيخِ.
words.exampleBs: Ovaj sprinter smatra se jednim od najbržih sportaša u historiji.
words.exampleEn: This sprinter is considered one of the fastest athletes in history.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَمِيَّزُ الْمُلَاكِمُ بِبِنْيَةٍ قَوِيَّةٍ وَعَضَلَاتٍ مَتِينَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Boksar se odlikuje snažnom građom i čvrstim mišićima.
words.exampleEn: The boxer stands out for his powerful build and firm muscles.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَاجُ الرِّيَاضِيُّ الْمُحْتَرِفُ إِلَى سَنَوَاتٍ مِنَ التَّدْرِيبِ الشَّاقِّ.
words.exampleBs: Profesionalni sportaš treba godine napornog treninga.
words.exampleEn: The professional athlete needs years of intensive training.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَّسِمُ الدَّوْرِيُّ بِطَابَعِهِ التَّنَافُسِيِّ الشَّدِيدِ.
words.exampleBs: Liga se odlikuje izrazito kompetitivnim karakterom.
words.exampleEn: The league is characterised by its highly competitive nature.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَمِيَّزُ الطَّالِبُ بِجِسْمٍ رِيَاضِيٍّ وَبِنْيَةٍ مُتَنَاسِقَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Student se ističe sportskim tijelom i skladno građenim tjelesnim okvirom.
words.exampleEn: The student is distinguished by an athletic body and a well-proportioned build.

words.exampleArabic: غَابَ اللَّاعِبُ الْمُصَابُ عَنِ الْمُبَارَيَاتِ لِعِدَّةِ أَسَابِيعَ.
words.exampleBs: Povrijeđeni igrač je bio odsutan s utakmica nekoliko sedmica.
words.exampleEn: The injured player was absent from matches for several weeks.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْرِصُ الرِّيَاضِيُّ عَلَى الْبَقَاءِ لَائِقًا بَدَنِيًّا طَوَالَ الْمَوْسِمِ.
words.exampleBs: Sportaš nastoji ostati u formi tokom cijele sezone.
words.exampleEn: The athlete strives to stay fit throughout the season.
